analysis.reasoning: Core message: Celebrates the 70th anniversary of China’s foreign aid and CIDCA’s 2nd anniversary, stressing global solidarity and that China stands with the world to overcome COVID-19. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no mention or contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; highlights China’s foreign aid tradition, international development cooperation, and standing united with the world during COVID-19—framing China as cooperative and supportive of global good. CH3 (epic history): No; anniversary mention is not about historical adversity or resilience narrative. CH4 (appropriate political system and values domestically): No; focus is international role, not domestic system/values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No explicit claim about domestic governance achievements or leadership superiority. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet advances CH2 only.
